Real on-chain slot0 diff on a never-initialised PoolKey; evidence=data/security_results/impact/uniswap_v4_measured_delta.json. Token-unit deltas are 0 (no ERC-20 movement); the slot0 measurement is the canonical C2 substrate-binding proof. oracle=src/night_shift_security/impact/measured_oracle.py.

reserve.name: Reserve Protocol
reserve.notes: v6 §6 target-rotation onboarding + measured-delta gate. eUSD RToken proxy (0xA0d69...): totalSupply delta 24093358768753702159239 (~24.09M eUSD) across blocks 25349777-25354793 (5016 blocks / ~27.9h). ERC1967 proxy + RTokenP1 implementation stable; harness=src/night_shift_security/native/reserve.py; foundry/test/ReserveMeasure.t.sol; Python smoke=tests/test_native_reserve.py. Per SPEC §8.2 honest-zero gate was retained (skip-on-no-RPC) until the live fork probe proved real measured impact. Discovery-mode priority 1 of v6 §5.1.

ethena_native.name: Ethena NativeHarness (scaffolded)
ethena_native.notes: v6.1 §5 empirical calibration probe (foundry/test/EthenaCalibrationProbe.t.sol) CONFIRMED the uint64/nonce-collision bug class in production bytecode (Lane A) and CONFIRMED it is NOT exploitable for direct USDe extraction (Lane B). Honest-zero outcome. NativeHarness stays at status=scaffolded because impact_oracle.measured=False. Required before promotion to 'ready': a different probe class (e.g., denial-of-mint with delegated signer access in WHITELIST mode) yields a measurable delta.

marginfi_v2.name: Marginfi v2
marginfi_v2.notes: v6.4 Step 1 (Path A) resolved canonical mainnet addresses: MarginfiGroup=4qp6Fx6tnZkY5Wropq9wUYgtFxXKwE6viZxFHg3rdAG8, USDC Bank=2s37akK2eyBbp8DZgCm7RtsaEz8eJP3Nxd4urLHQv7yB (owner=MFv2, data_len=1864, mint=USDC, group=4qp6), Liquidity Vault=7jaiZR5Sk8hdYN9MxTpczTcwbWpb5WEoxSANuUwveuat. Verified via on-chain getAccountInfo + Solscan USDC vault authority (3uxNepDbmkDNq6JhRja5Z8QwbTrfmkKP8AKZV5chYDGG, 705K USDC) cross-reference via transaction ALT expansion. Probe re-run: sentinel flip confirmed (sentinel_defaults_unresolved -> slot_advanced_with_state_readable, slot_delta=14, bank_account_present=true). Read-only probe observed no value delta (expected for passive observation); measured_impact=false. Promoted to ready because discovery gap is closed and substrate is readable for deeper probing (v6.4 fuzzing engine). Accounts JSON at sources/marginfi/marginfi_accounts.json. Source cloned at sources/marginfi/repo (0dotxyz/marginfi-v2 HEAD=4d57e2c). Tests: tests/test_native_marginfi.py (26 passed, 1 skipped).

drift.name: Drift Protocol
drift.notes: v6.5 onboarding: scaffolded after April 2026 $285M exploit (post-mortem only; oracle trust, key compromise, governance vectors are out of scope via Drift SECURITY.md). In-scope surfaces reviewed: LP pool constituent arithmetic (lp_pool.rs update_aum), signed_msg order eviction logic (SignedMsgOrderId max_slot), revenue_share builder/referrer fee accounting. Read-only probe observed program-account at slot=427822428 (lamports=49155476) -> slot=427822443 (lamports=49155476): zero lamport delta, classification=slot_advanced_without_measurable_state_change (expected for read-only observation). Honest-zero: source review confirms safe arithmetic throughout (safe_add/sub/mul/div). Required for promotion to ready: an executable drift.so BPF build + a focused test on LP pool add/remove_liquidity composition against a real or fork-validated state. Source at sources/drift/repo (drift-labs/protocol-v2 HEAD=0aee1b1). Probe script: hermes/scripts/v6_5_drift_probe.py.

meteora.name: Meteora DLMM
meteora.notes: v6.6 onboarding: scaffolded from MeteoraAg/dlmm-sdk Anchor.toml program ID confirmation. Three fresh-perspective attempts executed (fee round-trip, bin advancement, fee splitting) — all falsified. 5th empirical-FNR datapoint. Dynamic-fee FSM with volatility accumulator correctly implemented. No production defect found.
